metadata.weight_definition: Edge weight = initiative_count + article_count + advisorship_count. Each shared initiative, co-authored article, or advisorship adds 1.

relation_types.initiative: People who appear together in the same initiative team.
relation_types.article: People who co-authored the same article.
relation_types.advisorship: Supervisor and student connected by an advisorship.
